attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 WI.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY            
,WI.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
,WI.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY          
,WI.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
,WI.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD      
,WI.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       
,WI.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT   
,WI.PRODUCT_KEY                   
,WI.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                
,WI.ATTRIBUTION_PCT               
,WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             
,WI.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME          
,WI.TRX_SOURCE_CD      
,WI.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
,WI.LNKD_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,WI.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           
,'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE  
FROM  
$$STGDB.WI_AR_OFFER_RTNR_ATTRIB WI
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_AR_OFFER_RTNR_ATTRIB_FNL WI2
WHERE WI.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=WI2.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
AND WI.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY=WI2.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
AND WI.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY=WI2.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY)
AND (WI.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY>0 OR WI.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT>0)

SELECT
 WI_INCR.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,WI_INCR.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
,WI_INCR.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
,WI_INCR.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT	AS  BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,WI_INCR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD
,WI_INCR.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,WI_INCR.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT
,WI_INCR.PRODUCT_KEY
,WI_INCR.DV_PRODUCT_KEY
,WI_INCR.ATTRIBUTION_PCT
,WI_INCR.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
--,WI_INCR.DV_BOOKED_DT /*NEED TO RECONFIRM*/
,WI_INCR.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME
,WI_INCR.TRX_SOURCE_CD  
,COALESCE((CASE WHEN NATL.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE LIKE 'CM%' THEN SLS_TRX_CM.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY ELSE SLS_TRX_NONCM.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY END),-999) AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY 
,-9999 AS LNKD_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT /*WILL UPDATE IT IN POST SQL*/
,COALESCE(MT.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY,-999) AS SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_AR_OFFER_RTNR_ATTRIB_INCR WI_INCR

INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON WI_INCR.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 

LEFT OUTER JOIN 
 ( SELECT SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY,DV_TRANSACTION_ID,DV_ENTERPRISE_INV_SKU_ID
   FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_BKG_SLS_MOTION_ATTRIBUTION WHERE END_TV_DTM  = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' AND DV_TRX_TYPE = 'AR'
   GROUP BY 1,2,3
  ) MT
ON MT.DV_TRANSACTION_ID = WI_INCR.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND MT.DV_ENTERPRISE_INV_SKU_ID = WI_INCR.DV_PRODUCT_KEY

LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT * FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLS_TRX XAAS
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY XAAS.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT ORDER BY XAAS.ACTION_CD ASC,XAAS.LAST_UPDATE_DTM DESC)=1)SLS_TRX_NONCM
ON WI_INCR.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT=SLS_TRX_NONCM.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT  --> NEED TO ADD CONDITION TO TAKE ITM_SLSTRX_KEY OF FIRST YEAR (I.E.BOOKINGS)
AND WI_INCR.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT>0

LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT * FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLS_TRX XAAS
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY XAAS.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT ORDER BY XAAS.ACTION_CD ASC,XAAS.LAST_UPDATE_DTM DESC)=1)SLS_TRX_CM
ON WI_INCR.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT=SLS_TRX_CM.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT
AND WI_INCR.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT>0

WHERE (WI_INCR.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY>0 OR WI_INCR.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT>0) /*TO PREVENT QUALIFICATION OF NON APPLIED DATA*/

SELECT
 NDRVD.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,NDRVD.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
,NDRVD.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
,NDRVD.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT  AS BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,NDRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD
,NDRVD.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,CASE WHEN NDRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD IN ('INV','REV') THEN NATL.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT ELSE NRT.SUBSCRIPTION_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT END AS SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT
,NDRVD.PRODUCT_KEY
,NDRVD.DV_PRODUCT_KEY
,CASE WHEN NDRVD.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('BUNDLE','OFFSET','STANDALONE') THEN 100.00 
      WHEN NDRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD IN ('INV','REV') THEN NXOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT 
	  ELSE 0 END AS ATTRIBUTION_PCT /*RECHECK*/  /*for rte attributed, we don't have this col value even in base tables. so not populating it*/
,NDRVD.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
,NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME
,CASE WHEN NDRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD IN ('INV','REV') THEN 
      (CASE WHEN ( NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME NOT LIKE ALL ('%XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','PP-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE','BSFT-ORDERS')
				  OR ( NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT','ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT IN ('XAAS'))
				  OR ( NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ICMS-ADJ','AR-REBILLING')  AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD NOT IN ('BSFT-OPL'))
				) THEN 'ERP' ELSE 'XAAS' 
	  END)
	  WHEN NDRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD IN ('RTE_INV') THEN NRT.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD         
	  ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS TRX_SOURCE_CD   
FROM
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBM 
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG NDRVD
ON NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY=NDRVD.DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_BKG_KEY
AND NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE='AR'
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
ON NDRVD.AR_TRX_KEY=NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL 
ON NDRVD.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_REVENUE_TRANSFER NRT
ON NDRVD.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY=NRT.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE NXOA
ON NDRVD.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY=NXOA.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
WHERE NBM.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME>(SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_WI_AR_OFFER_RTNR_ATTRIB')
AND (NDRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD IN ('INV','REV') OR 
     (NDRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='RTE_INV' AND NDRVD.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','STANDALONE'))
	) /*OR DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD NOT IN ('AR_ADJUSTMENT')*/
AND NBM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY>0 /*TO CONSIDER ONLY APPLIED DATA*/  /*RECHECK*/
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_OFFER_RTNR_ATTRIB EL
WHERE NDRVD.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=EL.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
AND NDRVD.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY=EL.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
AND NDRVD.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY=EL.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY)
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY NDRVD.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,NDRVD.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,NDRVD.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY ORDER BY NBM.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME DESC)=1

SELECT
1 AS BATCH_ID
,WI_RTNR.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,WI_RTNR.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
,WI_RTNR.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
,WI_RTNR.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT	 
,WI_RTNR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD
,WI_RTNR.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,WI_RTNR.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT
,WI_RTNR.PRODUCT_KEY
,WI_RTNR.DV_PRODUCT_KEY
,WI_RTNR.ATTRIBUTION_PCT
,WI_RTNR.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
,WI_RTNR.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME
,WI_RTNR.TRX_SOURCE_CD  
,WI_RTNR.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY 
,WI_RTNR.LNKD_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
,WI_RTNR.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY    
,N_ERP.RTNR_UNIQUE_ID
--,N_ERP.ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY 
,N_ERP.SK_RTNR_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,N_ERP.SALES_MOTION_CD
,N_ERP.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT
--,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS START_TV_DTM
--,CAST('3500-01-01' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS END_TV_DTM
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_AR_OFFER_RTNR_ATTRIB WI_RTNR
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_ERP_OFFER_RTNR_ATTRIB N_ERP 
ON WI_RTNR.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=N_ERP.DV_TOPSKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND WI_RTNR.LNKD_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT=N_ERP.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
WHERE WI_RTNR.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY>0 AND WI_RTNR.TRX_SOURCE_CD='ERP'

UNION ALL 

/*FOR XAAS REFERENCE*/
SELECT
1 AS BATCH_ID
,WI_RTNR.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,WI_RTNR.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
,WI_RTNR.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
,WI_RTNR.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT	 
,WI_RTNR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD
,WI_RTNR.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,WI_RTNR.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT
,WI_RTNR.PRODUCT_KEY
,WI_RTNR.DV_PRODUCT_KEY
,WI_RTNR.ATTRIBUTION_PCT
,WI_RTNR.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
,WI_RTNR.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME
,WI_RTNR.TRX_SOURCE_CD  
,WI_RTNR.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY 
,WI_RTNR.LNKD_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
,WI_RTNR.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
,N_ERP.RTNR_UNIQUE_ID
--,N_ERP.ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY 
,N_ERP.SK_RTNR_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,N_ERP.SALES_MOTION_CD
,N_ERP.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT
--,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS START_TV_DTM
--,CAST('3500-01-01' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS END_TV_DTM
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_AR_OFFER_RTNR_ATTRIB WI_RTNR
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_OFFER_RTNR_ATTRIB N_ERP 
ON WI_RTNR.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY=N_ERP.DV_TOPSKU_SOSBR_ITM_SLSTRX_KEY
AND WI_RTNR.LNKD_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT=N_ERP.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
WHERE WI_RTNR.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY>0 AND WI_RTNR.TRX_SOURCE_CD='XAAS'

SELECT
1 AS BATCH_ID
,WI_RTNR.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,WI_RTNR.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
,WI_RTNR.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
,WI_RTNR.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT	 
,WI_RTNR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD
,WI_RTNR.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,WI_RTNR.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT
,WI_RTNR.PRODUCT_KEY
,WI_RTNR.DV_PRODUCT_KEY
,WI_RTNR.ATTRIBUTION_PCT
,WI_RTNR.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
,WI_RTNR.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME
,WI_RTNR.TRX_SOURCE_CD  
,WI_RTNR.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY 
,WI_RTNR.LNKD_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
,WI_RTNR.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY    
,N_ERP.RTNR_UNIQUE_ID
--,N_ERP.ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY 
,N_ERP.SK_RTNR_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,N_ERP.SALES_MOTION_CD
,N_ERP.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT
--,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS START_TV_DTM
--,CAST('3500-01-01' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS END_TV_DTM
FROM 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_WI_AR_OFFER_RTNR_ATTRIB WI_RTNR
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_ERP_OFFER_RTNR_ATTRIB N_ERP 
ON WI_RTNR.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=N_ERP.DV_TOPSKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND WI_RTNR.LNKD_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT=N_ERP.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
WHERE WI_RTNR.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY>0 AND WI_RTNR.TRX_SOURCE_CD='ERP'

UNION ALL 

/*FOR XAAS REFERENCE*/
SELECT
1 AS BATCH_ID
,WI_RTNR.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,WI_RTNR.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
,WI_RTNR.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
,WI_RTNR.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT	 
,WI_RTNR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD
,WI_RTNR.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,WI_RTNR.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT
,WI_RTNR.PRODUCT_KEY
,WI_RTNR.DV_PRODUCT_KEY
,WI_RTNR.ATTRIBUTION_PCT
,WI_RTNR.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
,WI_RTNR.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME
,WI_RTNR.TRX_SOURCE_CD  
,WI_RTNR.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY 
,WI_RTNR.LNKD_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
,WI_RTNR.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
,N_ERP.RTNR_UNIQUE_ID
--,N_ERP.ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY 
,N_ERP.SK_RTNR_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,N_ERP.SALES_MOTION_CD
,N_ERP.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT
--,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS START_TV_DTM
--,CAST('3500-01-01' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS END_TV_DTM
FROM 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_WI_AR_OFFER_RTNR_ATTRIB WI_RTNR
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_OFFER_RTNR_ATTRIB N_ERP 
ON WI_RTNR.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY=N_ERP.DV_TOPSKU_SOSBR_ITM_SLSTRX_KEY
AND WI_RTNR.LNKD_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT=N_ERP.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
WHERE WI_RTNR.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY>0 AND WI_RTNR.TRX_SOURCE_CD='XAAS'
